title: MintCore & CashMint Studio – Builder-First CashTokens Stack
description: Funding MintCore (CashTokens SDK) and CashMint Studio (creator minting platform) to deliver a clean, documented, production-ready stack for the Bitcoin Cash ecosystem.

milestones.name: MintCore foundation
milestones.description: Core API surface, comprehensive tests, and v1.0.0 release.

milestones.name: CashMint Studio MVP
milestones.description: End-to-end creator minting flow, fungible tokens + basic NFTs, hosted MVP.

milestones.name: Docs, templates, and examples
milestones.description: Developer docs, creator docs, example repos, and ready-to-fork templates.

milestones.name: Ecosystem integration & polish
milestones.description: Integration support, roadmap, governance docs, UX polish.
